calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David J. Brillant, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Gerda Kircher, who was not present at today's hearing.
Thomas Russie, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
David Saenz, Building Manager for plaintiff, was placed under but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Rosana Yang.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 28, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Receipt issued from Gerda Kircher Properties dated 4/17/08---------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Summons dated-----------------------------------------------------------------ID.
Exhibit 3---File endorsed copy of the complaint dated 4/17/08------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Gerda Kircher, and against defendant ROSANA YANG as follows:

Plaintiff Gerda Kircher shall recover from defendant ROSANA YANG Rent/Per Diem Damages in the sum of $1,1335.00, and Costs in the amount of $195.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $1,530.00.

Plaintiff Gerda Kircher is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1278 Market Street, No. 421, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Off Calendar
